content: Remote OK Supply Chain Director Novaris Search <p>Supply Chain Director</p><p><strong>New York, USA</strong></p><p><strong>On-site / Hybrid depending on business needs</strong></p><p><br></p><p><strong>About the Company</strong></p><p>Novaris Search is partnered with a growing business within the <strong>personal care and beauty manufacturing</strong> space that is looking to appoint a <strong>Supply Chain Director</strong> to lead and strengthen its end-to-end supply chain function.</p><p><br></p><p>This is a key leadership role for a commercially aware supply chain professional who can build structure, improve performance, and support the business through its next phase of growth.</p><p><br></p><p><strong>Position Overview</strong></p><p>The Supply Chain Director will be responsible for overseeing the full supply chain operation, including <strong>planning, procurement, inventory, logistics, and cross-functional coordination</strong> across the business.</p><p><br></p><p>The successful candidate will lead efforts to improve service levels, optimise inventory, strengthen supplier performance, and ensure the supply chain function is aligned with operational and commercial objectives.</p><p><br></p><p>This role would suit someone with strong leadership skills, a hands-on approach, and experience operating in a fast-paced <strong>manufacturing environment</strong>, ideally within <strong>personal care, cosmetics, beauty, or a related category</strong>.</p><p><br></p><p><strong>Key Responsibilities</strong></p><ul><li>Lead the end-to-end supply chain strategy across planning, procurement, inventory, warehousing, and logistics</li><li>Develop and improve supply chain processes to support service, cost, and efficiency targets</li><li>Partner with operations, manufacturing, commercial, and finance teams to align supply chain activities with business needs</li><li>Drive S&amp;OP and demand planning processes to improve forecasting accuracy and supply continuity</li><li>Manage supplier performance and support procurement strategies to reduce risk and improve reliability</li><li>Oversee inventory strategy to balance working capital with customer service requirements</li><li>Identify and implement continuous improvement initiatives across the supply chain function</li><li>Build, lead, and develop a high-performing supply chain team</li><li>Provide reporting, analysis, and leadership insight on supply chain performance, risks, and opportunities</li></ul><p><br></p><p><strong>Candidate Requirements</strong></p><ul><li>Proven experience in a senior supply chain leadership role within <strong>manufacturing</strong></li><li>Strong background across <strong>planning, procurement, inventory, logistics, and supply chain strategy</strong></li><li>Experience in <strong>personal care, beauty, cosmetics, OTC, or related consumer manufacturing</strong> would be preferred</li><li>Demonstrated ability to lead teams and improve supply chain performance in a fast-paced environment</li><li>Strong understanding of S&amp;OP, forecasting, supplier management, and inventory optimisation</li><li>Commercially minded with the ability to work cross-functionally across operations and business leadership</li><li>Strong problem-solving skills, leadership capability, and communication skills</li></ul><p><br></p><p><strong>Why Join?</strong></p><ul><li>Opportunity to join a growing business in a key leadership role</li><li>High level of visibility and influence across the organisation</li><li>Chance to shape supply chain strategy and drive meaningful operational improvement</li><li>Work within a dynamic manufacturing environment supporting growth and transformation</li></ul><p><br></p><p>Application Process</p><p>This search is being conducted on a confidential basis. If you would be interested in learning more, please apply directly or contact me for a confidential discussion at <strong>ben.symonds@novarissearch.com</strong>.</p> design, consulting, exec New York City Metropolitan Area 2026-07-03T17:20:00+00:00 1134454 https://remoteOK.com/remote-jobs/remote-supply-chain-director-novaris-search-1134454 https://remoteOK.com/assets/logo-square.png Associate Officer ARFF Adani Airport Holdings Ltd <strong>About Business<br><br></strong><strong> JOB DESCRIPTION <br><br></strong><strong>Adani Group</strong>: Adani Group is a diversified organisation in India comprising 10 publicly traded companies. It has created a world class logistics and utility infrastructure portfolio that has a pan-India presence. Adani Group is headquartered in Ahmedabad, in the state of Gujarat, India. Over the years, Adani Group has positioned itself to be the market leader in its logistics and energy businesses focusing on large scale infrastructure development in India with O &amp; M practices benchmarked to global standards. With four IG rated businesses, it is the only Infrastructure Investment Grade issuer in India.<br><br><strong>Adani Airports Holding Limited</strong>: Adani Airports Holding Limited is reshaping the aviation landscape, transforming airports into dynamic hubs of connectivity, innovation, and service excellence. By prioritizing passenger experience, leveraging state-of-the-art technology, and enhancing operational efficiency, we are redefining airport infrastructure across India. Our vision is to create world-class airports that serve as gateways to regional development and global connectivity, positioning Adani Airports as a leader in the aviation sector with a focus on sustainable growth and community impact.<br><br><strong>Job Purpose:</strong> Firefighter is responsible for responding to aircraft and structural fire emergencies, medical emergencies, hazardous material incidents, and other emergencies within the airport premises. This role involves ensuring the safety and security of passengers, crew, and airport personnel by performing firefighting, rescue and emergency medical services.<br><br><strong>Responsibilities<br><br></strong><strong>Emergency Response:<br><br></strong>Respond promptly to aircraft incidents, structural fires, medical emergencies, hazardous materials incidents, and other emergency situations on airport property.<br><br>Perform firefighting, rescue, and emergency medical services to ensure the safety of individuals and property.<br><br><strong>Fire Suppression<br><br></strong>Extinguish fires using various firefighting techniques, including the use of water, foam, dry chemicals, and other firefighting agents.<br><br>Conduct search and rescue operations in smoke-filled and hazardous environments.<br><br><strong>Emergency Medical Services<br><br></strong>Provide first aid and basic life support (BLS) to injured or ill individuals until advanced medical personnel arrive.<br><br>Assist in the transportation of patients to medical facilities as needed.<br><br><strong>Operational
